Name.jp: スカルゴブリン長司祭

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Poisoned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>중독</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>中毒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nGrants a Barrier equal to <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of Max Health at the start of battle. This buff cannot be removed.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>에 해당하는 실드를 생성합니다. 이 효과는 강화 해제되지 않습니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、自分に最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>分のシールドを付与する。この効果は解除されない。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,获得相当于生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的护盾。该效果不会被强化解除。
